entities.name: Clear focused mission
entities.context: Best practice principle: one worker should handle one cohesive task

entities.name: Explicit success criteria
entities.context: Best practice for defining clear completion conditions for workers

entities.name: Document dependencies
entities.context: Best practice for tracking what workers need from each other

entities.name: Delivery location
entities.context: Best practice for designating where worker output should go

entities.name: Circular dependencies
entities.context: Anti-pattern where workers depend on each other in loops

entities.name: Context-switch overhead
entities.context: Cost incurred when tasks are broken down too granularly

entities.name: Async coordination
entities.context: Inherent nature of worker-based systems - cannot expect perfect synchronization

relationships.context: Both are complementary best practices for worker design
Documenting dependencies helps identify and prevent circular ones
Properly scoped missions avoid granularity that causes overhead
Async nature makes circular dependencies especially problematic
